title: This Love of Ours

actors: Merle Oberon, Charles Korvin, Claude Rains
plot: At a convention, medical researcher Michel Touzac goes with colleagues to see stage caricaturist Targel, whose assistant Florence recognizes him--and attempts suicide. Saved by Touzac's new technique, Florence is revealed in a fla...
